title: source.json — ingest record for one track
description: What was ingested and what it contained, per ffprobe. Pure function of the input file (no run metadata). The original file is referenced, not required after ingest: source_audio.flac in the track dir is the working copy.

original_path.description: Absolute path at ingest time. Informational; may go stale — nothing re-reads it.

sha256.description: Hash of the original file bytes; track_id is its first 16 hex chars.

normalized_audio.description: The working audio copy stored in the track directory; all analysis reads this, and t=0 of the unified timeline is its first sample.

path.description: Relative to the track directory, e.g. 'source_audio.flac'.

audio_stream_sha256.description: Hash of the decoded PCM (s16le interleaved) — recognizes identical audio across remuxed containers for dedup hints.

media.description: ffprobe summary of the original container.

container.description: e.g. 'mov,mp4,m4a,3gp,3g2,mj2' as reported by ffprobe format.format_name.

video.description: Present only when the source has a video stream.

lyrics_input.description: Present only when a lyrics file was supplied at ingest.

path.description: Copy in the track dir, e.g. 'lyrics_input.lrc'.

has_timestamps.description: true for .lrc with time tags; those are used as alignment hints only.
